title: Fault Tolerance
description: Unexpected errors should be handled by the system, and users should get informative error messages

title: Compatibility
description: The system should be compatible with the majority of web browsers, including Edge, Firefox, Safari, and Chrome

title: Scalability
description: The system must support at least 100 concurrent users without exhibiting a discernible decrease in performance

title: Usability
description: The user interface must be easy to use and give applicants and recruiters clear instructions and help

title: Reliability
description: The system should be up and running 99.9% of the time

title: Performance
description: The system must respond to user input in less than two seconds

title: Maintainability
description: Code should be modular, follow best practices for coding, and have extensive documentation to facilitate maintenance

title: Privacy
description: The system needs to adhere to data protection regulations to guarantee the confidentiality of user, CVS, and evaluation data

title: Integration
description: The system ought to have the ability to interface with external services, such as ChatGPT, to verify the screening questions
